calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-08-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maria Torreano.
Kirk B. Freeman, Esq. in pro per, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants: Charlene Breese, Vance Breese, Bikerlady, Inc., Central Coast Stylez, LLC., Ram Jett Retainer and Santa Maria Software, Inc.
Counsel to prepare ONE new proposed Judgment with break down of Judgment amount for each defendant.

Nov. 4, 2004
Proposed Judgment rec'd in court.
Judgment granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan.
See scanned doc. for detail of Judgment against each defendant.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
